name: Kiyemba v. Obama
question: Does a federal district court exercising its habeas corpus jurisdiction have the power to order the release of prisoners held under Executive Order at Guantanamo Bay, Cuba into the United States?
description: A case in which the Court held that a federal court had the power to order the release of prisoners held under executive order, since almost all of the detainees in question had been offered resettlement in another country.
